body:
## Code Review

This pull request introduces platform-specific P/Invoke calls to `GetAsyncKeyState` from `user32.dll` to handle F9 and F10 key presses in `src/Runtime/Plugin.cs`, alongside adding server-alive checks and exception handling. It also updates SonarCloud configuration exclusions and ignore rules, adjusts Star Wars buffs YAML filters, and updates package lock files. A critical issue was identified where the direct use of Windows-specific P/Invoke without a platform guard will cause crashes on non-Windows platforms (macOS/Linux).
Copilot encountered an error and was unable to review this pull request. You can try again by re-requesting a review.

Cursor Bugbot has reviewed your changes and found 1 potential issue.
Autofix Details [Bugbot Autofix](https://cursor.com/docs/bugbot#autofix) prepared a fix for the issue found in the latest run. - ✅ Fixed: **F9/F10 double-toggle from duplicate key polling paths** - Background thread now only starts if PlayerLoop injection fails, preventing both paths from polling GetAsyncKeyState simultaneously and invoking OnF9Pressed/OnF10Pressed twice per key press.

Or push these changes by commenting: ``` @cursor push bcb4215526 ```
Preview (KooshaPari/Dino@bcb4215526) ```diff diff --git a/src/Runtime/Plugin.cs b/src/Runtime/Plugin.cs --- a/src/Runtime/Plugin.cs +++ b/src/Runtime/Plugin.cs @@ -215,27 +215,37 @@ StartResurrectionWatcher(); - // P0 fix: start the Win32 GetAsyncKeyState background thread so F9/F10 - // work at the main menu. Without this, the ECS OnUpdate polling only fires - // when SimulationSystemGroup is ticking (during gameplay), leaving the - // debug overlay unreachable from the menu. + // SPEC-004 Path 2: PlayerLoop.Update injection + SetPlayerLoop re-injection postfix. + // This path now uses GetAsyncKeyState and works correctly at the main menu. + bool playerLoopInjected = false; try { - Bridge.KeyInputSystem.StartKeyPollThread(); + playerLoopInjected = InjectPlayerLoopUpdate(); } catch (Exception ex) { - Log.LogWarning($"[Plugin] StartKeyPollThread failed: {ex}"); + Log.LogWarning($"[Plugin] InjectPlayerLoopUpdate failed: {ex}"); } - // SPEC-004 Path 2: PlayerLoop.Update injection + SetPlayerLoop re-injection postfix. - try + // P0 fix: start the Win32 GetAsyncKeyState background thread ONLY if PlayerLoop + // injection failed. Both paths poll the same keys with independent edge-detection, + // causing double-toggle if both are active. PlayerLoop path is preferred (runs every + // frame vs 50ms poll interval). + if (!playerLoopInjected) { - InjectPlayerLoopUpdate(); + try + { + Bridge.KeyInputSystem.StartKeyPollThread(); + Log.LogInfo("[Plugin] PlayerLoop injection failed, using background thread for F9/F10."); + } + catch (Exception ex) + { + Log.LogWarning($"[Plugin] StartKeyPollThread failed: {ex}"); + } } - catch (Exception ex) + else { - Log.LogWarning($"[Plugin] InjectPlayerLoopUpdate failed: {ex}"); + Log.LogInfo("[Plugin] PlayerLoop injection succeeded, background thread not needed."); } DebugLog.Write("Plugin", "Awake completed"); @@ -698,7 +708,8 @@ private static bool _playerLoopHarmonyPatched; /// SPEC-004 Path 2: append to PlayerLoop.Update. - private static void InjectPlayerLoopUpdate() + /// True if injection succeeded, false otherwise. + private static bool InjectPlayerLoopUpdate() { bool injected = Bridge.PlayerLoopKeyInputInjection.InjectIntoCurrentPlayerLoop( typeof(Bridge.PlayerLoopKeyInputInjection.DINOForgeUpdateMarker), @@ -712,6 +723,7 @@ { Log?.LogWarning("[Plugin] PlayerLoop DINOForgeUpdate injection failed (Update subsystem missing?)."); } + return injected; } private static int _playerLoopEventSystemTick; ```
You can send follow-ups to the cloud agent here.

Cursor Bugbot has reviewed your changes and found 4 potential issues.
Autofix Details [Bugbot Autofix](https://cursor.com/docs/bugbot#autofix) prepared fixes for all 4 issues found in the latest run. - ✅ Fixed: **Pause helper invokes all methods causing toggle oscillation** - Added HashSet to deduplicate MonoBehaviours and break after first successful invocation or when pause menu becomes visible - ✅ Fixed: **InvokeMethod force-activates GameObjects without restoring state** - Reverted to original guard that skips inactive GameObjects, removing the activation logic that permanently modified game state - ✅ Fixed: **Window-finding matches "DINO" substring too broadly** - Removed overly permissive 'DINO' substring matches, keeping only specific 'Diplomacy is Not an Option' and 'Diplomacy' checks - ✅ Fixed: **Auto-approve plus auto-merge bypasses human review** - Added PR validation step to workflow that restricts auto-merge to agent-authored PRs only based on branch naming or author

Or push these changes by commenting: ``` @cursor push 79e1117845 ```
Preview (KooshaPari/Dino@79e1117845) ```diff diff --git a/.github/workflows/agent-merge-on-bot-approve.yml b/.github/workflows/agent-merge-on-bot-approve.yml --- a/.github/workflows/agent-merge-on-bot-approve.yml +++ b/.github/workflows/agent-merge-on-bot-approve.yml @@ -38,6 +38,27 @@ echo "number=${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" fi + - name: Validate PR is agent-authored + uses: actions/github-script@ed597411d8f924073f74acbaed0d3e6b5d4c0b0 # v7 + with: + script: | + const pr = Number('${{ steps.pr.outputs.number }}'); + const owner = context.repo.owner; + const repo = context.repo.repo; + const { data: pull } = await github.rest.pulls.get({ owner, repo, pull_number: pr }); + const headRef = pull.head.ref; + const authorLogin = pull.user.login; + const isAgentBranch = headRef.startsWith('convoy/') || + headRef.startsWith('agent/') || + headRef.startsWith('cursor/'); + const isAgentAuthor = authorLogin.endsWith('[bot]') || + authorLogin === 'github-actions[bot]' || + authorLogin === 'coderabbitai[bot]'; + if (!isAgentBranch && !isAgentAuthor) { + core.setFailed(`PR #${pr} is not agent-authored (branch=${headRef}, author=${authorLogin}). Auto-merge restricted to agent PRs only.`); + } + core.info(`PR #${pr} validated: branch=${headRef}, author=${authorLogin}`); + - name: Wait for core CI (test check) uses: actions/github-script@ed597411d8f924073f74acbaed0d3e6b5d4c0b0 # v7 with: diff --git a/src/Runtime/Bridge/GameBridgeServer.cs b/src/Runtime/Bridge/GameBridgeServer.cs --- a/src/Runtime/Bridge/GameBridgeServer.cs +++ b/src/Runtime/Bridge/GameBridgeServer.cs @@ -1986,27 +1986,13 @@ var invoked = new List(); foreach (var mb in allMBs) { - if (mb == null) continue; + if (mb == null || !mb.gameObject.activeInHierarchy) continue; string tName = mb.GetType().Name; string goName = mb.gameObject.name; bool matches = tName.IndexOf(target, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0 || goName.IndexOf(target, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0; if (!matches) continue; - if (!mb.gameObject.activeInHierarchy) - { - Transform? current = mb.transform; - while (current != null) - { - if (!current.gameObject.activeSelf) - { - current.gameObject.SetActive(true); - } - - current = current.parent; - } - } - MethodInfo? mi = mb.GetType().GetMethod(method, BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic | BindingFlags.Instance, null, Type.EmptyTypes, null); diff --git a/src/Runtime/Bridge/PauseMenuBridgeHelper.cs b/src/Runtime/Bridge/PauseMenuBridgeHelper.cs --- a/src/Runtime/Bridge/PauseMenuBridgeHelper.cs +++ b/src/Runtime/Bridge/PauseMenuBridgeHelper.cs @@ -159,9 +159,11 @@ private static void TryInvokePauseTargets(string typeHint, string[] methods, List actions) { + var processedMBs = new HashSet(); + foreach (MonoBehaviour mb in Resources.FindObjectsOfTypeAll()) { - if (mb == null) + if (mb == null || processedMBs.Contains(mb)) { continue; } @@ -175,6 +177,8 @@ continue; } + processedMBs.Add(mb); + if (!mb.gameObject.activeInHierarchy) { ActivateHierarchy(mb.gameObject); @@ -189,6 +193,13 @@ } actions.Add(invokeDetail); + + if (IsPauseMenuVisible()) + { + return; + } + + break; } } } @@ -196,6 +207,7 @@ private static void TryInvokePauseTypesFromGameAssemblies(List actions) { string[] methodNames = { "TogglePause", "Toggle", "Pause", "Show", "Open" }; + var processedMBs = new HashSet(); foreach (Assembly asm in AppDomain.CurrentDomain.GetAssemblies()) { @@ -233,11 +245,13 @@ foreach (UnityEngine.Object obj in Resources.FindObjectsOfTypeAll(type)) { - if (obj is not MonoBehaviour mb) + if (obj is not MonoBehaviour mb || processedMBs.Contains(mb)) { continue; } + processedMBs.Add(mb); + if (!mb.gameObject.activeInHierarchy) { ActivateHierarchy(mb.gameObject); @@ -252,6 +266,13 @@ } actions.Add(invokeDetail); + + if (IsPauseMenuVisible()) + { + return; + } + + break; } } } diff --git a/src/Runtime/Bridge/Win32KeyInput.cs b/src/Runtime/Bridge/Win32KeyInput.cs --- a/src/Runtime/Bridge/Win32KeyInput.cs +++ b/src/Runtime/Bridge/Win32KeyInput.cs @@ -210,8 +210,7 @@ } if (windowTitle.Contains("Diplomacy is Not an Option", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) - || windowTitle.Contains("Diplomacy", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) - || windowTitle.Contains("DINO", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) + || windowTitle.Contains("Diplomacy", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { return process.MainWindowHandle; } @@ -231,12 +230,10 @@ string processName = process.ProcessName ?? ""; string windowTitle = process.MainWindowTitle ?? ""; - return processName.Contains("DINO", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) - || processName.Contains("Diplomacy", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) + return processName.Contains("Diplomacy", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || processName.Contains("Not an Option", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || windowTitle.Contains("Diplomacy is Not an Option", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) - || windowTitle.Contains("Diplomacy", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) - || windowTitle.Contains("DINO", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase); + || windowTitle.Contains("Diplomacy", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase); } private static ushort ResolveVirtualKey(string keyName) => ```
You can send follow-ups to the cloud agent here.

Cursor Bugbot has reviewed your changes and found 2 potential issues. There are 5 total unresolved issues (including 3 from previous reviews).
Autofix Details [Bugbot Autofix](https://cursor.com/docs/bugbot#autofix) prepared fixes for both issues found in the latest run. - ✅ Fixed: **Workflow logs "succeeded" after test check failure** - Added return statements after both core.setFailed() calls to prevent misleading success log messages from being written when checks fail. - ✅ Fixed: **Truncated SHA pin for actions/github-script (39 chars)** - Corrected all three instances of the truncated 39-character SHA to the full 40-character SHA ed597411d8f924073f98dfc5c65a23a2325f34cd for actions/github-script v8.

Or push these changes by commenting: ``` @cursor push 2136afa022 ```
Preview (KooshaPari/Dino@2136afa022) ```diff diff --git a/.github/workflows/agent-merge-on-bot-approve.yml b/.github/workflows/agent-merge-on-bot-approve.yml --- a/.github/workflows/agent-merge-on-bot-approve.yml +++ b/.github/workflows/agent-merge-on-bot-approve.yml @@ -42,7 +42,7 @@ fi - name: Validate allowed head branch - uses: actions/github-script@ed597411d8f924073f74acbaed0d3e6b5d4c0b0 # v7 + uses: actions/github-script@ed597411d8f924073f98dfc5c65a23a2325f34cd # v8 with: script: | const pr = Number('${{ steps.pr.outputs.number }}'); @@ -55,11 +55,12 @@ core.setFailed( `PR #${pr} head branch "${headRef}" is not allowed. Must start with: ${allowed.join(' ')}` ); + return; } core.info(`PR #${pr} head branch "${headRef}" is allowed`); - name: Wait for core CI (test check) - uses: actions/github-script@ed597411d8f924073f74acbaed0d3e6b5d4c0b0 # v7 + uses: actions/github-script@ed597411d8f924073f98dfc5c65a23a2325f34cd # v8 with: script: | const pr = Number('${{ steps.pr.outputs.number }}'); @@ -74,6 +75,7 @@ if (test?.status === 'completed') { if (test.conclusion !== 'success') { core.setFailed(`test check conclusion=${test.conclusion}`); + return; } core.info(`test check succeeded on ${sha}`); return; @@ -83,7 +85,7 @@ core.setFailed('Timed out waiting for test check'); - name: Merge PR - uses: actions/github-script@ed597411d8f924073f74acbaed0d3e6b5d4c0b0 # v7 + uses: actions/github-script@ed597411d8f924073f98dfc5c65a23a2325f34cd # v8 with: script: | const pr = Number('${{ steps.pr.outputs.number }}'); ```
You can send follow-ups to the cloud agent here.

Cursor Bugbot has reviewed your changes and found 2 potential issues. There are 7 total unresolved issues (including 5 from previous reviews). [Bugbot Autofix](https://cursor.com/docs/bugbot#autofix) prepared fixes for both issues found in the latest run. - ✅ Fixed: **Auto-approve plus auto-merge bypasses human code review** - Disabled auto_approve in .coderabbit.yaml to require human review before auto-merge can occur. - ✅ Fixed: **Duplicated ActivateHierarchy logic in HandleInvokeMethod** - Changed PauseMenuBridgeHelper.ActivateHierarchy to internal static and replaced duplicated logic in GameBridgeServer with a call to the shared method.

Or push these changes by commenting: ``` @cursor push 78a22b0981 ```
Preview (KooshaPari/Dino@78a22b0981) ```diff diff --git a/.coderabbit.yaml b/.coderabbit.yaml --- a/.coderabbit.yaml +++ b/.coderabbit.yaml @@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ review_status: true # Bot approval for agent-driven PRs (same flow as PR #188). auto_approve: - enabled: true + enabled: false auto_review: enabled: true drafts: false diff --git a/src/Runtime/Bridge/GameBridgeServer.cs b/src/Runtime/Bridge/GameBridgeServer.cs --- a/src/Runtime/Bridge/GameBridgeServer.cs +++ b/src/Runtime/Bridge/GameBridgeServer.cs @@ -1995,16 +1995,7 @@ if (!mb.gameObject.activeInHierarchy) { - Transform? current = mb.transform; - while (current != null) - { - if (!current.gameObject.activeSelf) - { - current.gameObject.SetActive(true); - } - - current = current.parent; - } + PauseMenuBridgeHelper.ActivateHierarchy(mb.gameObject); } MethodInfo? mi = mb.GetType().GetMethod(method, diff --git a/src/Runtime/Bridge/PauseMenuBridgeHelper.cs b/src/Runtime/Bridge/PauseMenuBridgeHelper.cs --- a/src/Runtime/Bridge/PauseMenuBridgeHelper.cs +++ b/src/Runtime/Bridge/PauseMenuBridgeHelper.cs @@ -286,7 +286,7 @@ } } - private static void ActivateHierarchy(GameObject go) + internal static void ActivateHierarchy(GameObject go) { Transform? current = go.transform; while (current != null) ```
You can send follow-ups to the cloud agent here. Reviewed by [Cursor Bugbot](https://cursor.com/bugbot) for commit 02f99d48a1f97e187e4d7ca105725d84124e4c47. Configure [here](https://www.cursor.com/dashboard/bugbot).
